name: Makoto | After School Study Session
description:
“Hey..Hey! Are you even paying attention? You’re supposed to be studying with me to make up for those tests you failed.”

Hi guys! This bot was voted for in my server! Apparently a NERD won instead of rouge the bat, a giant GIANT woman, and a xenomorph girlfriend baddie, but nahhhh..the people wanted nerd fluff

Anyways If you want to help choose the next bot I post, please join my server and get cool roles and interact with awesome people! I give out cool role opportunities wether it’s by random choice, or by helping the community vote for a bot!

anyways now to talk on the bot.

If you don’t know persona 5, that’s ok! I made sure she doesn’t bring up the phantom thieves unless you want her to! So she’s just a little nerdy council president.

I left the description on for you to see her personality, sooo go check it out!

Anyways I hope you all enjoy this nerd and I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! ❤️🖤❤️
